allow: Bash(cd D:/projects/vibelife && npx vitest run 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/regions | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data[\\"regions\\"]\)} regions'\); [print\(f'  - {r[\\"name\\"]} \({r[\\"id\\"]}\) biome:{\\"yes\\" if \\"biome\\" in r else \\"no\\"}'\) for r in data['regions']]" 2>/dev/null || sleep 2 && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/regions 2>&1 | head -3)

Bash(sleep 4 && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/regions | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d[\\"regions\\"]\)} regions up'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "waiting..." && sleep 2 && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health 2>&1)
Bash(taskkill //F //FI "IMAGENAME eq node.exe" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; echo "Processes killed")
